title: 01740_Patch-level_Routing_in_Mixture-of-Experts_is_Provably_Sample-efficient_for_Convolutional_Neural_Networks
positive_examples: pMoE reduces training and inference costs while maintaining test accuracy, leading to more efficient use of computational resources in deep learning applications.
pMoE can avoid learning spurious correlations, which enhances the robustness of models in real-world applications.
